subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and dispatched them unto whomsoever He willeth. He, verily, is the Mighty, the All-Praised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات و ارسلها لمن اراد انه لهو العزیز الحمید ان فی اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
